title: PrfaaS — Prefill-as-a-Service: Cross-Datacenter KVCache
summary_zh: 清華 + Moonshot AI。利用混合注意力模型（Ring-2.5/MiMo-V2-Flash/Qwen3.5）把 KVCache 壓縮 10–23×，使 PD disaggregation 得以跨資料中心部署於商用乙太網路（~100 Gbps）。設計選擇性長 context offload（$l>t$）、混合 prefix cache pool（線性狀態 + full-attention block）與雙時間尺度排程。1T 混合模型上相對同質 PD +54% 吞吐量、−64% P90 TTFT，相對 naive 異質 +32%。
summary_en: Tsinghua + Moonshot AI. Exploits hybrid-attention models (Ring-2.5 / MiMo-V2-Flash / Qwen3.5) whose KVCache is 10–23× smaller than dense baselines to make PD disaggregation feasible across datacenters over commodity Ethernet (~100 Gbps). Key designs: selective long-context offload ($l>t$), hybrid prefix cache pool (linear state + full-attention blocks), two-timescale bandwidth/cache-aware scheduler. On a 1T hybrid model, achieves +54% throughput and −64% P90 TTFT vs. homogeneous PD, and +32% vs. naive heterogeneous.
